<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">With chill confidence and effortless style, Toni rules the ramps.</>
<text color="FFFFFFFF">Drop in and carve your own way with the Skate Park Royalty Pack featuring:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale and Creative modes. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not not be used in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale and Creative modes. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not not be used in Save the World mode.

Name.SourceString: <text color="FB81FFFF">Toni</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Challenges.</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Earn up to 1,500 V-Bucks by completing </> <text color="FB81FFFF">Save the World </>  <text color="FFFFFFFF">daily quests.</> <text color="FB81FFFF">Challenges unlocked after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 3" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.</>
